process.commandLine:
python -c "import urllib.request
import sys

print('Testing network access using process container capabilities only')
print('=' * 60)
print('Enforcement mode: capabilities (no firewall rules, no admin required)')
print()

# Test 1: Make HTTP request to GitHub API
print('Test 1: Connecting to api.github.com...')
try:
    response = urllib.request.urlopen('https://api.github.com', timeout=10)
    data = response.read()
    print(f'  SUCCESS: Connected (status: {response.status})')
    print(f'  Response size: {len(data)} bytes')
    print(f'  Server: {response.getheader("Server")}')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'  ERROR: {type(e).__name__}: {e}')

print()

# Test 2: Make HTTP request to Google
print('Test 2: Connecting to www.google.com...')
try:
    response = urllib.request.urlopen('https://www.google.com', timeout=10)
    print(f'  SUCCESS: Connected (status: {response.status})')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'  ERROR: {type(e).__name__}: {e}')

print()
print('=' * 60)
print('Network access test complete!')
print()
print('Note: With capabilities-only mode, the internetClient capability')
print('      grants access to ALL network hosts. For granular control,')
print('      use enforcementMode: "firewall" or "both".')"
